hero.title: Create Spotify playlists by duration
hero.subtitle: Pick an artist, choose a duration, and generate a playlist that ends when you need it to.

source.label: Source
source.connectForLikedSongs: Connect Spotify to use Liked Songs

timerMix.title: Timer Mix
timerMix.description: Prepare a live timed mix that plays in this browser instead of exporting a playlist.
timerMix.requiresPremium: Timer Mix requires Spotify Premium and keeps playback inside this browser.
timerMix.authRequired: Connect Spotify to use Timer Mix.

preview.title: Playlist preview
preview.empty: Your generated track list will appear here.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.previewFailed: Unable to generate a preview. Please try again.
errors.exportFailed: Unable to export to Spotify. Please try again.
errors.missingPreview: Preview is missing. Generate a preview before exporting.
errors.noTracksFoundForFilter: No tracks matched that artist filter.
errors.playlistItemsForbidden: Spotify refused access to that playlist's items. Check playlist permissions and try again.
errors.likedSongsLoadFailed: Unable to load your Liked Songs from Spotify.
errors.playlistsLoadFailed: Unable to load your Spotify playlists.
errors.invalidSelectionMode: Selection mode must be Recent first or Random.
errors.spotifyAddItemsForbidden: Spotify created the playlist but refused adding items. The empty playlist was removed if possible. Please check Spotify app permissions and try again.

codes.SPOTIFY_ADD_TRACKS_FORBIDDEN: Spotify created the playlist but refused adding items. The empty playlist was removed if possible. Please check Spotify app permissions and try again.
codes.SPOTIFY_AUTH_ERROR: Spotify authorization failed. Please try again.
codes.SPOTIFY_SCOPE_ERROR: Spotify did not grant the required playlist permissions. Clear cookies and authorize again.
codes.PREVIEW_NOT_FOUND: This preview expired or could not be found.
codes.NO_EXPORTABLE_TRACKS: This preview has no Spotify tracks to export.
codes.NO_TRACKS_FOUND: No usable Spotify tracks were found for this source.
codes.NO_TRACKS_FOUND_FOR_FILTER: No tracks matched that artist filter.
codes.PLAYLISTS_LOAD_FAILED: Unable to load your Spotify playlists.
codes.PLAYLIST_NOT_FOUND: That playlist could not be found.
codes.PLAYLIST_ITEMS_FORBIDDEN: Spotify refused access to that playlist's items. Check playlist permissions and try again.
codes.LIKED_SONGS_LOAD_FAILED: Unable to load your Liked Songs from Spotify.
codes.INVALID_SELECTION_MODE: Selection mode must be Recent first or Random.
codes.NOT_ENOUGH_TRACKS: Not enough valid tracks were found for this Timer Mix.
codes.SHORT_TRACK_WARNING: Some selected tracks are shorter than their time block and may end early.
codes.DURATION_REQUIRED: Duration must be between 1 and 30 minutes.
codes.INVALID_FADE_SECONDS: Fade must be between 0 and 15 seconds.
codes.SPOTIFY_SDK_CONNECT_FAILED: The Spotify player could not connect.
codes.SPOTIFY_SDK_LOAD_FAILED: The Spotify player could not load.
codes.SPOTIFY_SDK_NOT_READY: The Spotify player is not ready yet.
codes.TIMER_MIX_PLAY_FAILED: Spotify refused to start playback on this device.

seo.title: Create Spotify playlists by duration
seo.description: Playlist Timer will generate playlists based on your chosen artist, target duration, and preferred accuracy.

meta.title: Playlist Timer — Create Spotify playlists by duration
meta.description: Create Spotify playlists that match a target duration. Pick an artist, choose a time, set your accuracy, preview the result and export it to Spotify.

og.title: Playlist Timer — Create Spotify playlists by duration
og.description: Create Spotify playlists that match a target duration. Pick an artist, choose a time, set your accuracy, preview the result and export it to Spotify.

twitter.title: Playlist Timer — Create Spotify playlists by duration
twitter.description: Create Spotify playlists that match a target duration. Pick an artist, choose a time, set your accuracy, preview the result and export it to Spotify.
